title: campanula balcanica f. borbasina
intro: Campanula balcanica f. borbasina, also known as Balkan bellflower, is a perennial plant belonging to the Campanulaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Campanula balcanica f. borbasina include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as an expectorant to help relieve respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
